description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark wood finish and a sleek, minimalist design. The front features a large, light gray panel that contrasts with the rich brown wood, and a vertical section on the right side with three recessed rectangular panels, likely indicating doors or compartments. The top surface is flat and wide, suitable for placing objects or for use as a counter. The sides are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and contemporary aesthetic. The base appears slightly recessed, giving the cabinet a floating appearance. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, reception areas, or modern office spaces.
description: A modern, dark wood cabinet with a light gray front panel and three recessed compartments on the right. Its sleek, minimalist design features a flat top and solid sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the light gray panel and three vertical recessed compartments on the right side, highlighting the main access points.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid, dark wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a large, uninterrupted light gray panel framed by dark wood, with no visible compartments or openings.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the edge of the cabinet, with the dark wood finish and a hint of the recessed base.
